# SEO Safety Checklist

Run through this list before and after editing article templates/pages.

- Keep `<title>` and `<meta name="description">` intact and page-specific.
- Preserve canonical URLs.
- Preserve Open Graph and Twitter metadata.
- Preserve JSON-LD `BlogPosting` structure and required fields.
- Preserve prev/next/start link relations for series pages where applicable.
- Avoid deleting article tags/keywords unless intentionally revised.
- Validate that generated URLs remain correct for route slug changes.
